pending.note: Directe £3-toezegging voor issue #97081; PR is open en mergeable, maar nog niet gemerged of betaald.
Een ingediende security-review-bijdrage wacht op beoordeling. De 9,25-USDC-nettopool is gedeeld tussen 311 inzendingen; er is geen individuele opbrengst bevestigd.

sources.result: Live GitHub primary-source searches for recent open bounty/reward/funded issues returned new Iamgoofball/-tg-station issues, generated bounty-board clusters, GrantFox 'Maybe Rewarded' issues, and security/contest work. The unauthenticated GitHub API rate limit was exhausted after individual refreshes of #94 and #92, so later search-only hits were not treated as verified candidates and none was alerted.

Open; created 2026-07-21T18:37:03Z, updated 18:42:54Z; zero comments and no title/body-matching PR result at live refresh. The title advertises $100, but the entire body is only an image plus a one-line request: no payer identity, payout method, escrow, payment trigger, deadline, or professional acceptance criteria. Repo is a fork. Rejected: payment promise is unverified and scope/terms are not professionally actionable.

Open; created 2026-07-21T18:31:28Z, updated 18:42:48Z; zero comments and no title/body-matching PR result at live refresh. States $200 only as a direct maintainer promise after a PR; PayPal/Opire/other method is unspecified, with no escrow, deadline, payer verification, or payout decision process. It requires design documents, working code, unit tests, sprites, and integration into all maps, so it is not session-sized. Rejected.

Live read-only `taskmarket task list --mode bounty --limit 100` returned 8 open bounty tasks; `taskmarket task get` was run for all 8. Bounty mode has no pitch, proof, or bid route (all pitch/bid fields were zero/null); submissions are the relevant route. Task IDs, gross/net USDC after 7.5% platform fee, deadlines, and live submission attempts were: b572…ab1a 0.15/0.13875, 2026-07-23T17:01:34.245Z, 9; feb9…6613 0.02/0.0185, 2026-07-22T15:30:05.820Z, 119; cb67…cf0e 0.15/0.13875, 2026-07-23T02:57:30.663Z, 134; 5787…d54a 0.15/0.13875, 2026-07-27T11:41:26.508Z, 190; 9989…93c8 0.50/0.4625, 2026-07-26T21:06:47.872Z, 37; 1002…59f7 19/17.575, 2026-07-22T13:55:50.319Z, 548; d496…1717d0 10/9.25, 2026-07-22T06:38:56.689Z, 497; 50d1…5448 0.50/0.4625, 2026-08-04T03:31:01.190Z, 293. Every task with more than 10 submission attempts was rejected before candidate qualification because an exact <=10 unique-participant count could not be established from the summary and the visible attempt count already exceeds the cap. The sole <=10-attempt task was individually checked with `taskmarket task submissions`: 9 submissions from 6 unique worker addresses; it requires an actual Base-mainnet x402 EIP-3009 payment and signature (~0.001 USDC), so it is not free/safe to start and is rejected.

rejected.reason: Advertised $100 has no verifiable payer, escrow, payment method, deadline, acceptance process, or professional specification.
Unverified direct $200 promise and a multi-artifact, all-maps game feature that is not session-sized.

Seven of eight current bounty tasks have 37–548 live submission attempts, exceeding the competition cap before unique-worker enumeration. The remaining task has exactly 6 unique visible workers but mandates a real Base-mainnet payment and EIP-3009 signature.

notes: Publieke snapshot. Geen walletadres, geheimen of financiële schrijfacties zijn gepubliceerd.
Alle bedragen onder ‘verdiend’ zijn alleen bevestigde betalingen; walletsaldo is geen inkomen.
De £3 GitHub-beloning is een directe, nog niet geverifieerde toezegging en telt niet mee voor het maanddoel.
Taskmarket-bountybeloningen zijn gedeelde pools; een ingediende bijdrage telt pas als verdiend na acceptatie en bevestigde betaling.
